<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Add the OpenRewrite Maven plugin to allow running the Java 21 migration recipe via mvn rewrite:run.`
- input:

```
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: c:\Users\agntd\Documents\GitHub\bing-wallpaper\pom.xml
@@
     <build>
         <plugins>
+            <!-- OpenRewrite plugin used temporarily to apply migration recipes -->
+            <plugin>
+                <groupId>org.openrewrite.maven</groupId>
+                <artifactId>rewrite-maven-plugin</artifactId>
+                <version>5.47.3</version>
+            </plugin>
             <!-- FIXED: Added version -->
             <plugin>
                 <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                 <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                 <version>3.13.0</version>
                 <configuration>
                     <source>1.8</source>
                     <target>1.8</target>
                 </configuration>
             </plugin>
*** End Patch
```


</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Configure rewrite-maven-plugin to use the local rewrite.yml and the named recipe upgrade-to-java21, so we can run mvn rewrite:run without -D properties.`
- input:

```
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: c:\Users\agntd\Documents\GitHub\bing-wallpaper\pom.xml
@@
             <plugin>
                 <groupId>org.openrewrite.maven</groupId>
                 <artifactId>rewrite-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                 <version>5.47.3</version>
+                <configuration>
+                    <activeRecipes>
+                        <recipe>upgrade-to-java21</recipe>
+                    </activeRecipes>
+                    <configLocation>${project.basedir}/rewrite.yml</configLocation>
+                </configuration>
             </plugin>
*** End Patch
```


</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Upgrade Maven compiler settings to Java 21: set properties to 21 and use maven-compiler-plugin 3.14.1 with <release>21</release>.`
- input:

```
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: c:\Users\agntd\Documents\GitHub\bing-wallpaper\pom.xml
@@
-    <properties>
-        <maven.compiler.source>8</maven.compiler.source>
-        <maven.compiler.target>8</maven.compiler.target>
+    <properties>
+        <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source>
+        <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target>
@@
-            <plugin>
-                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
-                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
-                <version>3.13.0</version>
-                <configuration>
-                    <source>1.8</source>
-                    <target>1.8</target>
-                </configuration>
-            </plugin>
+            <plugin>
+                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
+                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
+                <version>3.14.1</version>
+                <configuration>
+                    <release>21</release>
+                </configuration>
+            </plugin>
*** End Patch
```


</details></tool-use>
